products.title: Curated by Cammy: The Gummy Set
products.body_html:
Dive in to a delicious, fragrant experience with The Gummy Set, curated by Cammy! We're delighted to be back with another limited edition sample set, this time a collaboration between Cammyreviews x Ministry of Scent x Sweetish. For this set, Cammy responded to your requests to pair two of her most favorite things — perfumes and gummy candy. What's in the set? Here are the details...

The Fragrances:

  • Fraaagola Saalaaata by Hilde Soliani
  • In Love With Everything by Imaginary Authors
  • Crushed Fruits by Régime des Fleurs
  • Tonka Cola by Mancera
  • Tropical by Arquiste
  • Moon Jasmine by Scent Trunk

The Gummies & More:

Along with the fragrances, The Gummy Set includes a special assortment of Sweetish gummies selected by Cammy, packaged in a custom bag — each scent pairs with one gummy flavor! You'll also receive a card with Cammy's scent descriptions and a 10%-off code that can be used for full-bottle orders of the scents in the set. 

The Gummy Set Details:

A limited-edition release, The Gummy Set contains:

  • 6 x 1.5ml high-quality spray samples of perfumes chosen by Cammy to pair with delicious gummy candies
  • A generous bag of assorted Sweetish Gummies in custom Gummy Set packaging, flavors selected to match the scents
  • Print materials featuring Cammy's descriptions of each scent in the set
  • A special code that gives 10% off full-bottle orders of the scents in the set

About Cammyreviews

Camryn Kim (@cammyreviews) is a Seattle-based fragrance reviewer and scent obsessive. She believes in scent as a powerful means to cultivate self-expression, sensory regulation, and imaginary worlds. She has a particular fondness for the aromas of her childhood, including the smells of rice, rain, and evergreen forests.

products.title: Indult Discovery Set
products.body_html:
A perfect opportunity to get a taste of the entire Indult Paris collection in one generously-sized discovery set.

Prior to creating Maison Francis Kurkdjian in 2010, Francis was the founder and perfumer of Indult, where he created the four inaugural fragrances of the range – Cuir 404, Isvaraya, Manakara and Tihota – in such limited quantities that the total production was only 999 bottles of each fragrance. Years later, these same fragrances were relaunched so that people might once again enjoy their beauty. The Indult Paris range is Kurkdjian's reflection of his belief that perfumes are a transmitted expression of intimacy.

What's Inside

  • Cuir 404
    Formerly Rêve en Cuir, the newly updated Cuir 404 is a light-infused leather that is instantly legible, deliciously impossible
  • Isvaraya
    Reimagined in 2024. An olfactive allegory of the rich association between unique cultural facets of India with stunning plum, jasmine and patchouli notes
  • Manakara
    An ode to the Madagascar region famous for producing the most beautiful lychees in the world
  • Tihota
    A gorgeous blend of highest grade vanilla pods toned down with cane sugar, creamy notes and musk

FYI
Set contains 4 x 3ml perfume sample sprays

products.title: Teddy the Perfumer Discovery Set
products.body_html:
Welcome to the world of Teddy The Perfumer, where each fragrance is created by independent perfumer, Teddy Haugen. Anyone who knows Teddy from his charismatic content is well aware of his penchant for taking us behind the scenes into the life, work and perspectives of a passionate indie perfumer — from scent formulation secrets and industry info to candid reviews, viral fragrance-fit pairings and his young daughter's own hilariously honest reactions to his works in progress.

The Teddy the Perfumer Discovery Set contains generous samples of the three fragrances from his inaugural collection in 2024, as well as his two new launches in March 2026. It's a great introduction to Teddy's world.

About the Set
Five 2ml eau de parfum spray samples of Teddy's fragrances.

What's Inside

products.title: The Red List Project x Ministry of Scent Sample Set
products.body_html:
Created in a collaboration between Ministry of Scent and The Red List Project, the limited edition Earth Day Sample Set was jointly inspired by a love of plants, the science of scent and concern for the health of our planet. With 100% of sales proceeds donated to TRLP to support their global conservation efforts, the set features fragrances and layering notes that illustrate a beautiful range of plants, their habitats and their evocative scent profiles.

As a team, we believe in the power of olfactory storytelling, one that piques curiosity about the natural world and sparks individual conservation action. We also believe in the positive influence of scent to provide bursts of much-needed joy, and remember that without plants, there would be no perfume!

The *limited edition* Earth Day Sample Set includes :

  • 5 x 2ml fragrance samples
    • Abîme: Smoke, amber and wood pull you into the abyss
    • Bianco Latte: The milky-vanilla gourmand skin scent superstar
    • Brazilian Lily: Elegant tropical lily with a hint of fresh fruits
    • A Grove by the Sea: An Adriatic aromatic with olive oil and fig
    • Santal Austral: A sensual white sandalwood
  • 3 x 3ml layering notes
    • Angel’s Trumpet Accord
    • Sandalwood Artessence (Biolandes)
    • Natural Vanillin Crystals
  • 6 x informational cards
  • MOS x The Red List Project Field Notebook & pencil
  • Scent strips

FYI
A special code will be included with all orders, giving $10 off purchases of full bottles of scents in the set. 100% of proceeds from the Earth Day Sample Set will be donated to The Red List Project, a US-based non-profit organization dedicated to the conservation of imperiled plants and critical habitats designated by the global IUCN Red List as biodiversity hotspots.

products.title: Fugazzi Fragrance Routine Set
products.body_html:
From Fugazzi
This is not a set. It's your curated journey into the transformative power of scent. Begin by preparing your skin with our Angel Dust cleansing foam, creating the perfect canvas to unlock the full potential of each fragrance. 

Explore the scents. Each one is thoughtfully crafted to evoke emotions, spark connection, and attract moments of beauty and joy. Let these fragrances guide you as you discover the notes that will shape your personal narrative.

Immerse yourself. Fragrance is more than a scent - it is a way to create moments that turn into memories, lingering long after they've passed.

What's Inside
One 8ml bottle of Angel Dust foaming shower gel, and 2ml samples of the following fragrances:

  • Angel Dust Extrait
    A fan favorite elevated with a double dose of velvety cashmeran and white amber. The bite of black pepper is juxtaposed with bright pink pepper.
  • Vanilla Haze Extrait
    Vanilla that's spiked, smoked, and turned all the way up. Toasted hazelnut and coconut milk meld with smoky saffron and clove, rounded out with caramel and bourbon vanilla.
  • Orange Crush Extrait
    Sun-ripened orange, spicy pepperwood and the cool confidence of akigalawood. Iso E Super and soft musk keeps them guessing. 
  • Sugardaddy Extrait
    A burst of tangerine and black currant reveals a soft, spicy heart and alluring jasmine. A warm base of moss, cashmere, and patchouli ground the sweetness with a subtle edge.
  • Passionfroudh Extrait
    Brazil’s soul, bottled. Tropical fruits and zingy ginger balanced with black tea. Black pepper and gurjun balsam add intrigue, while Oudh Assafi and cypriol create a smoky, seductive foundation.
  • Nocologne Extrait
    Audacious citruses lifted by a green twist of Dutch herbs. Pink pepper, mimosa, and clary sage add softness and structure. Fresh, smooth, and just a little unruly.

FYI
Set contains 6 x 2ml perfume sample sprays and one 80ml bottle of Angel Dust foaming shower gel.

Angel Dust foam is a vegan cleansing shower gel that luxuriously foams upon contact with water, cleansing and pampering your skin. Infused with the Angel Dust fragrance, it's the perfect start to your perfume layering routine, delivering softness and indulgence with every use.

What's Inside

  • I Don't Know What
    A fragrance enhancer with transparent radiance that gives any perfume a certain, as the French say, “I don’t know what.”
  • Rose Atlantic
    Spritzers aboard the famous Salt Spray Rose. Sinatra’s summer wind, dunegrass in the distance, rosehip, the white lighthouse.
  • Radio Bombay
    Transistor radio hewn of sandalwood radiates ragas in the Bandra heat. Hot copper tubes warm the soft wood releasing blooms of musk, cream, peach, ambrette, coco, cedar distillates.
  • Pistachio
    It’s pistachio! Our cult classic Studio Juice has joined the line full-time.
  • Debaser
    The wild shrill of Indie rock coming through the college radio station in hot August heat. Ripe fig, iris, coconut milk, tonka and dry blond woods.

Perfumer
David Seth Moltz

FYI
Set contains 5 x 7.5ml miniature perfumes.
D.S. & Durga perfumes are 100% vegan, never tested on animals (other than the humans that work at D.S. & Durga) and paraben/phthalate free.

products.title: DS & Durga Cologne Trio
products.body_html:
Experience three jaunty, retro colognes by DS & Durga perfumer David Seth Moltz (D.S.) with our limited edition set of 3 x 1.5ml spray samples. Here's how D.S. describes these dandy recent arrivals...

Golfjazz: "An homage to the deep heavy green chypre/sport colognes that were ubiquitous in New England in the 80s. It's a golf fantasy by a guy who doesn't golf. A perfect companion to daydream golfers and patrons of the 19th hole like myself."

Notes: grass, limes, leather, mint, moss, patchouli, mimosa, cypress, cedarwood

Grey Blazer: "A grey blazer of fragrance — that donegal flecked herringbone you can wear everyday most of the year in formal or relaxed settings. It's a broadly appealing concoction of herbs, flowers, spices, tea and musk that works on anyone, anywhere. I imagine a corporate schmuck around 2000, wanting out of “the life,” smelling the wool of his perfect Donegal blazer and dreaming of visiting Ireland... finding himself in the heathered hills."

Notes: green spices, hedgerow flowers, virgin wool, tea, cyclamen, mandarin, guaiacwood, carnation, tonka, lavender

Rum Bay Rum: "A classic bay rum I've been sitting on since 2008. A DSD team member reminded me of it last year. We dug it out of the archive and realized this soft, spicy bay rum that lasts was needed in the world today! Many men aspire to dress like their grandpa and wear the colognes he would have worn."

Notes: West Indian bay, linden, sandalwood, clove, neroli, pimento berry, rose, opoponax, juniper berry

products.title: Les Bains Guerbois Discovery Set
products.body_html:
About the Set
The Les Bains Guerbois Discovery Set includes samples of nine of the most stunning fragrances from the exceptional French niche fragrance brand Les Bains Guerbois. Each fragrance in the Les Bains Guerbois Eau de Parfum collection represents a specific year, story, or guest of this legendary Parisian destination. The collection features works from perfumers Michel Almairac, Dominique Ropion, Fanny Bal, Bertrand Duchaufour, Jérôme Epinette and Dorothée Piot. The scents are notable not only for their meticulous blends and remarkable quality on skin, but also for their daring compositions, where unexpected ingredients are combined to create impeccably refined and totally original perfumes.

A wild and storied place, Les Bains Guerbois was founded in 1885 by Auguste Guerbois. It began as a luxurious spa, where high society rubbed elbows with artists and writers such as Monet, Renoir and Proust, a period captured in scents 1885 & 1900. In 1978, it morphed into Les Bains Douches, a world-renowned nightclub with a guest list including David Bowie, Iman, Mick Jagger, Grace Jones, and Prince; 1978, 1979, 1986, and 1992 are all tributes to this decadent period. In 2015, Les Bains transformed (again!) into a chic 5-star boutique hotel, club, and spa. This most recent period of transformation is captured in 2013, 2015, and 2018.

What's Inside

  • 1885 Bains Sulfureux
    Elegant herbs and resins sink into tonka & musk
  • 1900 L’Heure de Proust
    Blueberries and pomelo tea with leather & amber
  • 1978 Les Bains Douches
    Citrus and whiskey over rose, tobacco, musk & amber
  • 1979 New Wave
    Cool iris and mint contrasts with warm woods
  • 1986 Eclectique
    Honeyed amber with dried fruits, spice & musk
  • 1992 Purple Night
    Creamy white flowers with mandarin & leather
  • 2013 Résidence d’Artistes
    A sexy blend of cumin and musks & sandalwood
  • 2015 Le Phénix
    Patchouli and spice are enlivened with ginger
  • 2018 Roxo Tonic
    Sparkling citrus, aromatic herbs & sweet woods

FYI
The Les Bains Guerbois Discovery Set includes 9 x 1.5ml perfume sample spray vials. The set is housed in an inspired deluxe box with liner notes.

  • Bergamatto
    A forever favorite of the perfumer's, bergamot originated in Italy by crossing a lemon tree with a bitter orange. Here the citrus that flavors Earl Grey Tea stars in an elegant blend of Calabrian bergamot, bitter orange, cardamom and white musk.
  • Limone
    Inspired by a trip to the Amalfi Coast — a dramatic landscape of Mediterranean blue water, steep winding roads and terraced lemon groves. Bright and cheerful Italian lemon is stylishly elevated with ginger, orange leaf and white musk.
  • Mandarino
    When Jean-Claude Ellena wants to lend his fragrances a radiant smile, he reaches for "joyous" mandarin oil. Both simple and sophisticated, this award-winning composition of Italian mandarin, blackcurrant and white musk is not to be missed.
  • Pompelmo
    A celebration of grapefruit, from the fresh fruit to textural rind. The perfumer worked intentionally on both the lively and sour freshness of grapefruit, while highlighting its satisfyingly bitter dimensions.

products.title: Escentric 8.5ml Discovery Set
products.body_html:
The Escentric Molecules 8.5ml Discovery Set contains five sleek travel sprays, featuring each fragrance in the Escentric collection. Expanding on the original concept of skin scents built around a single aroma molecule, the Escentric fragrances include complimentary notes that enhance and elevate each core ingredient. A perfect way to get close and personal with the entire line-up:

Escentric 01 
Centered on the enigmatic woody molecule Iso E Super™, with fresh lime peel, green jasmine bud (hedione), soft balsams and musk.

Escentric 02
Featuring Ambroxan™, a sensual amber molecule with a clean mineral freshness, together with green jasmine bud (hedione) and a sparkling gin + tonic accord.

Escentric 03 
Built around vetiveryl acetate, a smooth and woody vetiver molecule with a grapefruit accent, together with fresh lime peel, ginger, green peppercorn and musk.

Escentric 04
Focused on Javanol™, a sheer sandalwood molecule, together with crisp, bitter topnotes of pink grapefruit peel, lime zest, juniper and pink pepper.

Escentric 05
Starring Cashmeran™, a dry, radiant, warm and woody molecule with an unexpected touch of pine resin.

From Escentric Molecules

The Escentric 8.5ml Discovery Set, designed to invoke a sense of freedom and exploration, is adventure-ready by design and allows you to experience every part of the Escentric puzzle before choosing your favorite piece. The fragrances are housed in 8.5ml, party-friendly vessels, shrunken-down for you to try, travel with and take on a night out.

The Escentric fragrances highlight the unique character of the aroma-molecule with ingredients chosen to bring out the molecule's key facets.

Escentric 01: Cult-scented Formula
Escentric 02: Sparkling Freshness
Escentric 03: Arboreal Concoction
Escentric 04: Hazy Fantasy
Escentric 05: Deconstructed Mediterranea

Perfumer
Geza Schoen

FYI
All five Escentric fragrances are brimming with character and unbeholden to gender distinctions, making for a gender-free reinterpretation of classic perfumery ingredients.

products.title: M+ 8.5ml Discovery Set
products.body_html:

products.title: DS & Durga Murder Mystery Layering Set
products.body_html:
Haven't got a clue how to layer scents? Never fear, the DS & Durga Murder Mystery Layering Set is here! A Clue themed box set where you're the detective. Solve the mystery of which scent "suspects" layer best on your skin in combination with the brand's top seller, I Don't Know What.

From DS & DURGA
The Case of the Stolen Heart Notes: Someone has stolen the heart of I DON'T KNOW WHAT! The suspects are all lined up. It could be anyone...or any combination... layer your own solution.

From David Moltz AKA D.S.
I have wanted to make a layering set that actually works for years. I am passionate about having clients involved in their own creation process. While solving the mystery of who stole the heart of I DON'T KNOW WHAT (our fragrance with no heart note section), one can honestly make their own perfume and endlessly play with these 6 fumes I believe fragrance can live on the level of literature. This set is a world one can enter and build via the nose.

Transparent patchouli with a signature spicy-earthy quality.

Professor Rose
Rose Layering Perfume
Dewy fresh rose petals with a delicate sandalwood base.

Prince Amber
Amber layering perfume
Soft desert ambers, fine incense.

Madam Currant
Currant Layering Perfume
Dark fruits with deep transparent moss.

Dr. Newman Hay
Hay Layering Perfume
Country airs of new mown hay & meadows.

I Don't Know What
A fragrance enhancer with transparent radiance.

    David Seth Moltz

Almond Suede: An offbeat gourmand marzipan-leather surprise, evoking the ancient, aroma-rich streets and cultures of Córdoba, Spain. By Calice Becker.

A Grove by the Sea: Summer on an evergreen island in the Adriatic sea, with aromatic fresh herbs, ripening figs, olive groves and green leaves. By Rodrigo Flores Roux.

Tropical: A juicy, decadent ode to guava, over white flowers and warm woods. Inspired by a modernist garden in the balmy city of Mêrida, Yucatán. By Rodrigo Flores Roux.

Venice Rococo. A secret affair of vintage powder, delicate rose water, black violet and naughty animalic amber. Venice boudoir in the 1700s. By Rodrigo Flores Roux.

Buckle up and travel through space and time with a perfume discovery set of seven historically inspired, unisex scents from Swedish niche fragrance brand 19-69. Each vibrant, rainbow-colored 19-69 fragrance is inspired by and named after an iconic moment, cultural scene, art work, or place. products.title: Dialogue 1: Riso & Grano Travel Duo
products.body_html:
From Jijide
Dialogue 1 includes Riso and Grano, two variations on the theme of street food, told from two different perspectives.

In the Asian perspective, Riso takes us through the streets of Shanghai, amidst the steam of rice in its sweet and savory versions, in a soft play of contrasts. In the European perspective, we find Grano, which brings us to Paris on a rainy morning, among the scents of bread and croissants from French boulangeries.

featured_image.alt: Jijide Dialogue 1: Riso & Grano Travel Duo-2 x 10 ml Travel Spray Set

products.title: Dialogue 2: Terra & Fuoco Travel Duo
products.body_html:
From Jijide
Dialogue 2 includes Terra and Fuoco, two variations on the theme of conviviality and the sense of belonging.

Terra takes us to the African landscape at sunset, with notes that evoke the dryness and heat of the earth and sun, strongly contrasted by a clean aldehyde scent. Fuoco accompanies us to the Balkans, with scenes depicting social moments among friends smoking cigarettes and the inviting aroma of roasted chestnuts filling the air with an unmistakable scent.

featured_image.alt: Jijide Dialogue 2: Terra & Fuoco Travel Duo-2 x 10 ml Travel Spray Set

products.title: Dialogue 3: Dentro & Oltre Travel Duo
products.body_html:
From Jijide
Dialogue 3 includes Dentro and Oltre, two variations on the theme of Italian identity.

Dentro takes us into the life of those who decide to put down roots in Italy, to stay, with familiar scents of mocha and coffee, and the fig tree, from leaf to fruit. Oltre accompanies us into the life of those who, instead, decide to leave and rewrite their destiny elsewhere. It does so by taking us through the routine of the first day at work: the ironed shirt, the metallic steam, the skincare routine, and the makeup borrowed from mom.

featured_image.alt: Jijide Dialogue 3: Dentro & Oltre Travel Duo-2 x 10 ml Travel Spray Set

Founded by Arnaud Poulain and based in an historic castle built in the 1800s known as the Primordial Estate, Les Eaux Primordiales is a "traditional and visionary perfume factory," where the invention of the perfumes is a collaborative effort between Poulain and his former teacher, perfumer Amélie Bourgeois.

“We don't create a perfume. We invent a perfume. For this inventor, everything starts from the dream. After the dream, comes the surpassing of oneself. Then follows an ever new and sensitive creative process that shapes a radically original product. To live your life is to take your dreams by surprise."

It is with these words that Arnaud Poulain explains the genesis of his collections which he invites us to interpret.

products.title: Flotholt Scent Survival Kit
products.body_html:
FLOTHOLT
Sigur Rós X Fischersund
Head above water - Scent survival kit

The FLOTHOLT SCENT SURVIVAL KIT includes one 5ml fragrance vial of limited edition FLOTHOLT, created especially for the Sigur Rós World Tour 2022. Also includes three incense cones and one Icelandic herbal teabag. Allow this exclusive scentsorial experience to carry you away. Simply close your eyes, spray and escape.

Sigur Rós is an Icelandic post-rock band from Reykjavík, active since 1994. The band comprises singer and guitarist Jón Þór "Jónsi" Birgisson, bassist Georg Holm and keyboardist Kjartan Sveinsson. www.sigurros.com

Fischersund is a family-run business that harnesses a collective of artisans at the intersection of scent, shop, gallery and art. The team includes Jónsi (the perfumer), Lilja, Inga Birgis, Rosa, and their partners Sindri and Kjartan. The brand lives in an experiential shop in downtown Reykjavik – a creative space in which every object has been designed to convey the aesthetic manifesto – allowing the senses to synthesize and harmonize.

All products are handmade in Reykjavík, Iceland.

Notes: amber, bergamot, birch tar, fresh air, seaweed, dirt, grass, vetiver

The set is housed in a hand-treated tin box made by their father Birgir and features fragrances No. 23, No.54 and Flotholt. Each bottle is a 5ml mini with spray, and a perfect way to find your new fragrance favorite.

Fischersund No. 23
Smoky and addictive with notes of aniseed, black pepper and tobacco seeds.

Fischersund No. 54
This woody scent is a go-to for its warm and comforting accord of vetiver, patchouli and animalistic musk.

FLOTHOLT
The first-ever Sigur Rós x Fischersund limited edition FLOTHOLT features a blend of amber, bergamot, birch tar, fresh air, seaweed, dirt, grass and vetiver.

products.title: Fischersund Langdegi (Light) Discovery Set

Langdegi means "longest day" in Icelandic and each summer solstice on June 12th, it stays light through the night. These crisp fragrances harken back to these long summer nights when the sun never sets.

The set is housed in a hand-treated tin box made by their father Birgir and features fragrances No. 8, No. 101 and Útilykt. Each bottle is a 5ml mini with spray, and a perfect way to find your new fragrance favorite.

Fischersund No. 8
A floral scent with bursts of tart rhubarb, citrus and crisp pine.

Fischersund No. 101
This green/herbal scent features notes of angelica, sorrell, long grass, dandelions, blackcurrants and poplar trees.

ÚTILYKT
An ethereal scent with notes of arctic wind, moss, birch, thyme and hints of seasalt.

Ministry of Scent Senior Fragrance Specialist, Celina, has exquisite taste, with a penchant for dark, dangerous roses and leather-laced compositions that leave a trail of mystery in their wake. So when she suggested a limited edition sample set for fragrance-loving femme fatales, we knew it would be irresistible. Here's what she had to say about these six sultry, noir-esque scents...

Crystal Saffron: “A striking yet sheer veil of saffron, musks and incense that will leave a lasting impression even after you make your escape. A 'skin scent' for a vixen.”

East: “A magnetic love potion of velvety oud, leather and raspberry on a bed of ambroxan musk that lingers on your skin and clothes till the next morning.” 

Hibiscus Mahajad: “A hypnotic siren song of hibicus tea sipped at a gemstone market. Distract them with jammy rose then slip away with the treasure, in a disguise of vanilla, ambrette musks and spiced leather.”

La-Bàs: “Pomme fruits and rose draped in oak moss, patchouli, castoreum and what feels like a brand new leather jacket. You're the rockstar, not just the rockstar’s girlfriend.”

Dark Vinyl Musk: “What I imagine Dracula’s brides to smell like. A marriage of resins and leather, enriched with incense, amber and sandalwood, enlivening a deep, vampy rose.”

Nektar: “An elusive scent fit for an Italian neo-noir. Pink pepper and a splash of bergamot melt into Omani Sidr honey, with a dash of cinnamon over a leather-infused tiramisu accord. Keeps you guessing but always coming back for more."

The *limited edition* Femme Fatale Sample Set includes 6 x 1.5ml high quality spray samples. 💋

products.title: Rubeus Voyageur
products.body_html:
The Chris Collins Rubeus Voyageur box includes 7.5ml travel sprays of each of the three fragrances from this passionate and daring collection, plus a sleek metallic reusable travel case. 

What's Inside

  • African Rooibos
    Opulent yet effortless, this fragrance evokes the exquisite breezes of South Africa’s mountains. Rooibos leaves, cedarwood, and bergamot radiate vitality, while cardamom and black pepper add spiced allure. This scent is for those who embody confident sophistication.

  • Vide Cor Meum
    Reveal the essence of the soul through the beauty of rose. Vanilla lends sweetness, while incense adds a cloak of mystery. This fragrance, whose name translates to “See My Heart,” is a timeless seduction that lingers like – and is named after – a classic aria. 

  • Lust Oud Delice
    This is a tantalizing temptation to drive those around you wild with magnetic seduction. A chocolate and hazelnut concoction, its gourmand top notes give way to woody benzoin resin and oud, creating an unforgettable intensity that ignites desire like a legendary lover’s touch.
